company: South Star Auto Components Pvt. Ltd.
_planted_violations_for_demo: IND-GENDER-CODED (uses 'salesman' as job title + 'he will' phrasing)
IND-PAY-PARITY (different pay for men vs women; 'salary as per gender')
job_posting:
Salesman — South Star Auto Components Pvt. Ltd. (Chennai, Tamil Nadu; field role)

We are hiring a Salesman to cover the Tamil Nadu dealer network. The salesman will own his territory P&L and report directly to the Regional Head — he will travel four days a week and be on call with dealers on weekends.

Compensation is structured with different pay for men and women based on field-availability assumptions: the male rate is ₹65,000 per month base + commission, and the female rate is ₹50,000 per month base + commission. Salary as per gender; this is non-negotiable.

Responsibilities: own dealer relationships in assigned districts, hit monthly targets, file weekly reports, escalate channel conflicts.
Requirements: B.Com / BBA; 3-7 years of B2B field sales; comfortable with extensive travel; two-wheeler licence mandatory.
